commits.title: Add payment provider latency spans
commits.author: Nolan Brooks
commits.diff_summary: Add trace spans and metric labels around payment provider calls without changing request behavior.

commits.title: Refactor digital wallet validation rules
commits.author: Maya Chen
commits.diff_summary: Replace the digital_wallet validation rule mapping. Missing rules now raise ValidationRuleMissing during checkout payment validation.

commits.title: Rename checkout metric labels
commits.author: Nolan Brooks
commits.diff_summary: Rename checkout duration histogram labels and document the HTTP server error rate metric.

commits.title: Update authentication client dependency
commits.author: Rina Patel
commits.diff_summary: Upgrade the token verification client and update authentication retry defaults.

commits.title: Tune payment database connection pool
commits.author: Sam Ortega
commits.diff_summary: Increase payment database connection pool size and connection acquisition timeout.
